projectDescription: An agentic engineering platform that plans, executes, and ships GitHub pull requests using Gemini AI models running in isolated E2B sandboxes.
keyFeatures: AI-powered project planning with Gemini 3 Pro generating phased task graphs with dependencies
Isolated E2B sandbox execution running Gemini CLI in YOLO mode for autonomous coding
PR-first workflow: every completed task automatically opens a GitHub pull request for review
Real-time execution visibility with live JSONL event streaming via Upstash Realtime
Human-in-the-loop mission control UI for approving, requesting changes, or merging PRs
Task state machine managing PENDING → RUNNING → REVIEW → DONE transitions with retry logic
Secret redaction ensuring API keys are never exposed in execution logs
Vibe-to-preview with Gemini 3 Flash turning rough ideas into structured project metadata
publicApiSurface: startTask(projectId, taskId?) — claim and begin executing a task in a sandbox
completeTask(projectId, taskId, result) — finalize task with success/failure and PR URL
getNextRunnableTask(projectId) — find next unblocked PENDING task respecting dependencies
isProjectRunning(projectId) — check if a project has an active task execution
generatePreview(input) — Gemini 3 Flash preview agent: vibe → name, tagline, description
generatePlan(input) — Gemini 3 Pro planner agent: description → phased task graph
Server action: createProject — create a project with vibe input
Server action: startExecution — trigger task execution for a project
Server action: reviewTask — approve/reject a task in REVIEW state
Realtime channel: execution.task_started / task_log / task_review / task_failed
